title: Never Say Goodbye
writer: I.A.L. Diamond, James V. Kern, Ben Barzman
actors: Errol Flynn, Eleanor Parker, Lucile Watson
plot: After divorce, 7-year-old Flip is unhappy. She begins corresponding with a Marine, sending him a photo of Ellen pretending she wrote the flirtatious letters. When the Marine arrives to meet his pen pal, Ellen uses it to make Phil ...
